intent: 2BR / 1 bath, FRONT-BACK split with central hall notch, full LDK front, no carport. 12x10 lot gives an 8x6 envelope = 48 m2 floor -- the published minimum (front-back split halves the depth per band, so it needs buildable depth ~5-6 m; sub-minimum lots route to the vertical-split hall sibling). The whole FRONT half is a full LDK: living (left) | dining (middle) | kitchen (right), side by side. The whole REAR half is private: master (left) | hall+T&B middle column | standard (right). Master, standard, and the single T&B all door into the central hall; the hall opens into dining. No ensuite.
must_haves: central hallway serving both bedrooms and the T&B
front-back split: full LDK across the front, bedrooms across the rear
separate living, dining, and kitchen side by side
